title: Clinical Laboratory Technician
description: Sanofi is seeking a Clinical Laboratory Technician for our Denver facility to support pharmaceutical research and quality control. Work hybrid in a scientific environment where your laboratory skills contribute to developing life-saving medicines.
responsibilities: Perform clinical and analytical laboratory tests on patient specimens
Operate and maintain laboratory equipment and instruments
Prepare specimens and reagents according to established protocols
Record and report laboratory test results accurately
Maintain laboratory safety standards and regulatory compliance
Support quality control and assurance procedures

requirements.education: Associate's degree or Bachelor's degree in Clinical Laboratory Science or related field
skills: Knowledge of laboratory safety and biosafety protocols
Computer skills and data entry proficiency
certifications: Clinical Laboratory Scientist (CLS) or Clinical Laboratory Technician (CLT) certification required
